overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an action RPG showing an armored character traversing a snowy mountain landscape. The character walks through deep snow along a coastal cliff, passes ritual figures, and encounters a massive serpentine dragon emerging from misty waters before turning toward a distant waterfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain path along coastal cliff

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow along a mountain path, heading toward distant figures

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face covered in snow and ice formations
frozen or misty sea visible beyond the snowy shoreline
large boulders partially buried in snow along the path
several robed figures standing motionless with arms raised in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide snowy mountain landscape with a frozen sea visible to the right. The terrain is open with scattered rocks and sparse vegetation. Several distant figures stand motionless ahead on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal ritual site with stone figures

agents.ego_description: approaching a robed figure standing by the path, continuing toward the misty waterfront

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing still with right arm raised toward the sky

entered.detail: stone-like robed figure with arm raised in a ritual gesture
jagged rocks along the frozen coastline

segments.scene_description: The character passes close to a stationary robed figure with raised arm on the left, approaching the misty coastline. The path continues along the snowy shore with coastal rocks visible to the right.

events.description: massive serpentine dragon emerges from the misty water in the distance
character stops walking and looks up at the towering dragon

agents.ego_description: stopping to gaze up at the massive dragon that has emerged from the water

notable_agents.action: giant serpentine dragon with scales and whiskers emerging from misty water, head raised high

entered.detail: massive dragon with detailed scales, spines, and long whiskers towering above the landscape
mist-covered water or ice from which the dragon emerges

segments.scene_description: A massive serpentine dragon suddenly emerges from the misty water ahead, dominating the sky. The character stops walking to look up at the towering creature, which has intricate scales and spines along its back.

events.description: character turns away from the dragon and begins walking back up the snowy slope
view shifts to reveal an icy waterfall ahead in the mountain valley

agents.ego_description: turning away from the dragon and walking back up the slope toward a distant waterfall

entered.detail: large frozen waterfall cascading down the mountain face ahead
large snow-covered rocks scattered across the path

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the dragon and walks back up the snowy slope. As the dragon disappears from view behind, an icy waterfall becomes visible in the distance ahead, marking the path forward through the mountain valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate snowy mountain landscape that shifts from a quiet trek along a frozen coast to a dramatic encounter with a mythical creature. It begins with the character traversing an open, rocky terrain beside a frozen sea, moving toward several motionless figures standing in the distance. As the character passes a stationary robed figure with a raised arm, the path narrows along a misty coastline dotted with coastal rocks. The scene then reaches a climax as a massive serpentine dragon with intricate scales suddenly emerges from the misty waters to dominate the sky, forcing the character to a halt. Finally, the camera turns away from the creature and follows the character back up the snowy slope, where the view opens up to reveal a distant icy waterfall marking the path through the mountain valley.
